_meta.note: Demo environment — placeholder data for showcase purposes

milestones.label: Letter of Award (LOA)
milestones.description: Contract award — official project start. Marks commencement of EPC contract.

milestones.label: Kick-Off Meeting Completed
milestones.description: Formal kick-off with all stakeholders. Baseline schedule and interfaces agreed.

milestones.label: Issued for Construction — Engineering Drawings
milestones.description: All discipline IFC drawings released to construction. Delayed by vendor data approvals.

milestones.label: Foundations — Mechanical Completion
milestones.description: All civil foundations handed over to structural team. Currently on critical path.

milestones.label: Column Internals Delivery to Site
milestones.description: Critical long-lead item. Drives all downstream column erection and piping.

milestones.label: Mechanical Completion (MC)
milestones.description: All mechanical systems installed and commissioned. Project MC gate.
milestones.notes: Target recovery to reduce to +45d slip by Q3 2026

milestones.label: Ready for Start-Up (RFSU)
milestones.description: All systems ready for plant start-up. Requires MC completion plus commissioning.
